items.title: PRLI image and image-pair figures dependency
items.reason: PRLI text explicitly depends on figure 4 for Process_Associator/image identification and figure 5 for image-pair identification, but usable figure assets with stable captioned evidence were not recoverable from the processed assets inspected.
